name: glottos-app
description: Unified monorepo: glottos courses + text tutor on one server with one user system.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @glottos/courses && npm run build -w @glottos/tutor
scripts.test: npm run test -w @glottos/shared && npm run test -w @glottos/courses && npm run test -w @glottos/tutor
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @glottos/courses && npm run lint -w @glottos/tutor
